title: simple-mod-pack
description: 1.21.4 modpack: 1.7/1.8 visuals, performance, quality of life
body:
check the mod list by checking out the latest version (modrinth broke latest link redirect)

# Settings

### opinionated:
* set menuBackgroundBlurriness to 0
* disabled, pauseOnLostFocus (alt-tab without esc menu opening) 
* disabled allowServerListing (you appear as "Anonymous Player" when hovering over a server's player count you're on)

### popular:
* Disabled V-Sync
* Set FPS to unlimited
* Cleared Sodium donation button
* Set brightness to full
* Set GUI scale to 3 (Large)
* enabled toggleSprint
* disabled narratorHotkey
* set the textBackgroundOpacity 0% (à la fastchat)
* skipped the tutorial (move, break tree ect..)
* skipped skipMultiplayer Warning
* skipped hideBundleTutorial
* unbound the save & load creative toolbar keys
* set music volume to 0%
* enabled darkMojangStudiosBackground (logo color when launching)


# Disabled mods

Feel free to re-enable them in your instance's mod list

* [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
* [OrthoCamera](https://modrinth.com/mod/orthocamera) (orthographic view)
* [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
* appleskin
* [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) (not compatible with Flashback)
